name: Eclipsed Heart
original_name: ดุจจันทร์ดั้นเมฆ
overview: A romantic drama about a former convict who wants to turn his life around and a kind-hearted female teacher who ends up living under the same roof to care for his mother. Their contrasting personalities draw them closer, leading to love. However, their relationship faces challenges due to his troubled past and unresolved issues, including a former enemy who returns seeking revenge.

trailers.title: ดุจจันทร์ดั้นเมฆ | ละครดี 7HD ปี 2568
